remarks: Newly renovated first-floor unit in a well-maintained two-family home! This bright and inviting apartment features a spacious eat-in kitchen with abundant natural light, new flooring, and newer appliances. The freshly painted living room offers a comfortable gathering space, while the versatile third bedroom is perfect for a home office, guest room, or additional bedroom. Down the hallway, you'll find a generously sized primary bedroom, a second bedroom, and a full bathroom with a tub/shower combination and single vanity. A convenient side entrance provides easy access for bringing in groceries and everyday essentials. Additional amenities include off-street parking for two vehicles, use of a shared front porch, and a large lower-level laundry room with ample storage or pantry space. Conveniently located near shopping, restaurants, parks, schools, and major commuting routes, this move-in-ready rental offers comfort, space, and practicality in a welcoming owner-occupied home. Minimum 680 credit score for all applicants 18+ and collectively 2.5 x monthly rent in income: No exceptions! Sadly no pets due to allergies, please don't ask. Schedule your tour today!
